response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-02:26: Identified the first song as 'Cobra' from the on-screen text 'コブラ'. Searched and confirmed Yoko Takahashi as a primary performer/artist and found the lyrics. 2. 02:27-end: Identified the second song as 'IT'S LOVE' from the on-screen text. Credits indicated Lyrics: 岩佐友晴, Music: 野下俊哉. Searched 'It's Love 岩佐友晴 野下俊哉' and found the original artist RABBIT and the full lyrics. 3. Finalized the scene breakdowns and verified lyrics against the search results.
response.global_summary: The video features two distinct vocal performances by VTuber models in a concert setting. The first song is 'Cobra' (originally by Yoko Takahashi), and the second song is 'IT'S LOVE' (originally by RABBIT).

scenes.description: A red-haired VTuber model performs 'Cobra' on a stage with backup dancers, while light sticks are waved by an audience.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
街をつつむ Midnight fog
孤独な Silhouette
動き出せばそれは
まぎれもなく ヤツさ
コブラ Leaving me blue
コブラ Missing you true
コブラ Only few memories after you
背中にまといつく翳(かげ)りは
オトコという名のものがたり
許されるはずもない Peace&Love
空をよぎる Silent voice
おさえた Violence
うずくたびにひとり
闇を仰ぐ ヤツさ
コブラ Leaving me blue
コブラ Missing you true
コブラ Only few memories after you
ハートに刻まれたあの日は
ロマンと呼ぶには熱過ぎて
めぐりくるはずもない Peace&Love
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Wrapped in the midnight fog,
A lonely silhouette,
When he starts to move,
There's no mistake, it's him.
Cobra, leaving me blue,
Cobra, missing you true,
Cobra, only few memories after you.
The shadow clinging to his back,
Is a story called a man,
There's no forgiveness, just peace & love.
Crossing the sky, a silent voice,
Suppressing the violence,
Every time it aches,
He looks up at the darkness alone, it's him.
Cobra, leaving me blue,
Cobra, missing you true,
Cobra, only few memories after you.
That day carved into his heart,
Was too hot to call romance,
And there's no way it will come around again, peace & love.
